source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A large, 50.0-cm-diameter metal cylinder filled with air supports a piston that can slide up and down without friction. The piston is 100.0 cm above the bottom when the temperature is 20^\circ C. A student then stands on the piston. After several minutes have elapsed, by how much has the piston been depressed?
